audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with no significant background noise or emotional inflection.
temporal_description: In a modern, glass-walled conference room, a man in a white shirt and dark pants stands at the head of a long table, facing seated individuals. Four men are seated around the table, dressed in light blue shirts and dark pants, with some wearing ties; one has a cap on the table in front of him. Papers and white mugs are placed on the table, and a television screen is visible on the left side. In the background, people are seen walking through a hallway, and a woman is seated at a desk behind glass partitions. The standing man occasionally shifts his weight and gestures slightly with his hands, while the seated individuals remain mostly still, occasionally looking toward him or at their papers.
